collections.title: Media & Publishing Systems
collections.description: Transcription, subtitles, podcast workflows, chaptering, localization, loudness cleanup, and final-mile publishing prep.
collections.editorial_caution: Prefer workflow-shaped entries over bare libraries when possible.
who_for: Podcast, video, course, and newsroom teams that need repeatable post-production handoffs.
Operations leads who want transcripts, subtitles, chapters, and loudness checks before content ships.
jobs_covered: Transcribe long-form audio and video into reviewable text.
Align subtitles and narration timing after edits.
Normalize audio loudness and prepare publishing metadata.
Create searchable media archives for downstream agents.
editorial_notes: Prioritize tools that create durable artifacts an editor can inspect.
Keep fully automated publishing behind human review for final titles, clips, and claims.

podcast-rss-feed-transcriber.why_here: Starts a release workflow from the source feed by fetching episodes and producing transcript artifacts.

realign-drifting-subtitles-against-finis.why_here: Fixes subtitle drift after final video edits without manually retiming every cue.

force-align-narration-and-transcript-tex.why_here: Turns existing narration plus script text into timed caption or SMIL maps for accessible publishing.

ffsubsync-subtitle-synchronization-tool.why_here: Gives teams a fast low-friction subtitle sync step before uploading captions.

normalize-loudness-across-podcast-lesson.why_here: Prevents inconsistent perceived volume across a batch of episodes, lessons, or social clips.

whisperx-speech-recognition-timestamps-d.why_here: Adds word timestamps and speaker diarization for searchable transcripts, clips, and chaptering.

capture-youtube-transcripts-without-brow.why_here: Fetches available YouTube captions without brittle browser automation or scraping a video page.

faster-whisper-high-performance-speech-t.why_here: Handles high-volume transcription runs where speed and local control matter more than a hosted API.

deepgram-realtime-transcription-connecto.why_here: Covers live captions and streaming call transcription where batch Whisper-style workflows are too late.

assemblyai-summarization-chapters-skill.why_here: Converts transcripts into chapter summaries for show notes, lesson outlines, and archive navigation.

youtube-chapters-generator-whisper.why_here: Turns YouTube source audio into timestamped chapters so editors can build navigable videos, show notes, and repurposing briefs.

summarize-urls-files-podcasts-and-youtub.why_here: Creates compact briefs from URLs, files, podcasts, and YouTube sources before downstream scripting, clipping, or editorial review.

self-host-an-openai-compatible-speech-ap.why_here: Lets teams keep OpenAI-compatible speech workflows while self-hosting audio processing.

yt-dlp-feature-rich-audio-video-download.why_here: Adds the standard audio/video source acquisition layer before transcription, captioning, chaptering, or repurposing workflows.

analyze-videos-with-frame-extraction-and.why_here: Extracts frames and audio context from videos so editors and researchers can build reviewable media summaries before publishing.

whisper-subtitle-generator.why_here: Creates subtitle files from speech audio for teams that need caption artifacts before video or course release.

whishper-self-hosted-speech-to-text-audi.why_here: Adds a self-hosted speech-to-text workflow for privacy-conscious media teams handling interviews, lessons, or internal recordings.

generate-local-subtitles-for-video-editi.why_here: Adds a local subtitle generation step for editors who need captions before exporting or publishing finished video.

collections.title: Finance & Filings
collections.description: Filings research, invoice intake, billing operations, reconciliation, and finance-adjacent reporting.
collections.editorial_caution: Frame Stripe-based entries as revenue-ops and billing workflows, not generic payment tooling.
who_for: Finance operators, founders, RevOps teams, and analysts who need evidence-backed filings, invoice, billing, and reconciliation workflows.
Teams that receive messy PDFs, CSV exports, payment processor data, or portfolio records and need repeatable extraction before analysis.
jobs_covered: Pull SEC filing data and source documents for review packets.
Extract invoice fields and PDF tables into structured records.
Reconcile payments, invoices, subscriptions, and usage-metered revenue.
Profile CSV exports before loading them into spreadsheets, warehouses, or dashboards.
Build finance-facing reports without inventing a full data platform first.
editorial_notes: The collection is intentionally not a Stripe shelf: Stripe appears only where it represents a differentiated reporting or reconciliation workflow.
Listed-but-domain-specific picks remain when there is no stronger security-reviewed substitute for the finance job, especially EDGAR and QuickBooks workflows.
Prefer tools that leave auditable intermediate files over black-box financial advice or autonomous money movement.

sec-edgar-financial-filing-parser.why_here: Anchors filing research with EDGAR search, company filing APIs, and XBRL-oriented extraction.

extract-invoice-fields-from-vendor-pdfs-.why_here: Turns recurring vendor invoices into structured records before approval, coding, or reconciliation.

quickbooks-invoice-reconciliation.why_here: Connects invoice state to accounting-system reconciliation instead of stopping at document extraction.

openmeter-usage-metering-and-billing-pla.why_here: Covers usage metering and entitlement data needed before usage-based billing can be trusted.

stripe-reporting-agent.why_here: Keeps Stripe coverage focused on operational reporting rather than generic payment API access.

stripe-revenue-reconciliation-agent.why_here: Pulls charges, refunds, disputes, and payouts into a reconciliation workflow with finance-facing evidence.

ghostfolio-wealth-management-portfolio-t.why_here: Adds portfolio tracking for investment and asset reporting workflows beyond payments and invoices.

pdfplumber-python-pdf-text-table-extract.why_here: Extracts tables and layout-aware text from financial PDFs that are not invoice-shaped.

tabula-pdf-table-extractor.why_here: Gives teams a focused table-extraction path for statements, filings, and PDF schedules.

turn-messy-document-collections-into-str.why_here: Moves document-heavy finance work from one-off prompts into repeatable extraction pipelines.

duckdb-sql-analytics-agent.why_here: Lets analysts query local CSV, Parquet, and JSON exports quickly without standing up a warehouse.

trdsql-sql-query-engine-csv-json-yaml-fi.why_here: Supports quick SQL checks over exported files when reconciliation questions start as CSV or JSON.

profile-and-clean-large-csv-datasets-fro.why_here: Profiles and cleans large exports before spreadsheet review or warehouse load.

compare-recurring-csv-tsv-or-json-export.why_here: Explains row-level differences between recurring exports, which is core to reconciliation review.

run-persistent-finance-research-workspac.why_here: Creates persistent finance research workspaces where filings, market data, models, charts, and thesis notes stay organized across analysis passes.

apache-superset-dashboard-sql-exploratio.why_here: Turns cleaned finance datasets into shareable dashboards and SQL-backed reporting views.

create-repair-and-recalculate-spreadshee.why_here: Creates and repairs workbook models while preserving formulas, which is central to finance reporting and reconciliation handoffs.

metabase-dashboard-snapshot-alerting-2.why_here: Captures dashboard snapshots and alerts so finance teams can monitor recurring metrics without manually checking reports.

connect-accounting-agents-to-xero-throug.why_here: Adds a direct Xero accounting connector for invoice, contact, and finance-record workflows after extraction or reconciliation.

extract-ocr-ready-markdown-from-document.why_here: Converts scanned statements, receipts, and finance PDFs into OCR-ready Markdown before filing review or table extraction.

use-pandasai-for-conversational-csv-and-.why_here: Lets analysts interrogate CSV and spreadsheet exports in natural language before building heavier dashboards.

read-google-drive-files-and-edit-sheets-.why_here: Connects agents to Drive and Sheets where finance teams often stage reconciliations, forecast models, and review exports.

prepare-bid-proposal-drafts-and-complian.why_here: Fits finance-adjacent bid and proposal workflows where requirements, pricing, and compliance checks need a review packet.

prepare-agent-ready-pdf-and-document-ext.why_here: Adds a lightweight PDF extraction path for filings, statements, and vendor documents before spreadsheet or dashboard work.

convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.why_here: Turns mixed statements, filing exhibits, invoice packets, and spreadsheet-adjacent documents into reviewable Markdown or JSON before finance analysis.
convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.persona: Finance analyst / filings and vendor document intake ops

collections.title: Ecommerce & Retail Operations
collections.description: Catalog management, storefront automation, orders, inventory sync, marketplace support, and review-driven merchandising.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this about operating a store, not about generic product or content tooling.
who_for: Store operators, marketplace teams, and ecommerce engineers managing catalog, order, inventory, and payment workflows.
Teams that need agents to inspect commerce data without treating the storefront UI as the system of record.
jobs_covered: Sync product, customer, order, and inventory data.
Inspect webhooks and payment events around store operations.
Provision marketplace or subscription payment flows.
Track prices and operational signals across storefronts.
editorial_notes: This collection stays focused on operating stores and marketplaces, not generic web scraping or content generation.
Stripe is limited to two differentiated payment workflows: checkout/payment flow and marketplace/Connect payout sync.

saleor-open-source-headless-commerce-gra.why_here: Provides an API-first commerce backend for catalog, checkout, order, and channel workflows.

medusa-commerce-api-store-operations-aut.why_here: Covers modular store operations where agents need backend APIs rather than storefront clicks.

build-and-validate-shopify-apps-with-the.why_here: Covers Shopify app build and validation work for teams extending storefront and admin operations with the official toolkit.
build-and-validate-shopify-apps-with-the.persona: Shopify app engineer / commerce platform lead

woocommerce-rest-inventory-sync.why_here: Keeps WooCommerce inventory synchronized across channels without treating wp-admin as the workflow surface.

stripe-connect-marketplace-sync.why_here: Covers the marketplace side of retail payments: Connect transfers, reversals, and payout reconciliation across sellers.

woocommerce-webhook-orchestrator.why_here: Routes WooCommerce webhook events into repeatable order, inventory, and fulfillment automations.

run-shopify-admin-product-order-customer.why_here: Exposes Shopify Admin actions to MCP clients while keeping catalog and order work supervised.

stripe-payment-flow-connector.why_here: Retained as the single Stripe checkout/payment-flow pick for validating cart-to-payment intent behavior.

cheerio-product-price-tracker.why_here: Monitors product price pages when no clean feed or partner API exists for competitive checks.

collections.title: Legal Ops & Compliance
collections.description: Contract workflows, forms, document review, archive search, and evidence-oriented legal and compliance support.
collections.editorial_caution: Do not let infra-policy scanners take over this collection. Keep v1 document-centric.
who_for: Legal operations, compliance, and records teams that need document intake, review, redaction, and archive workflows.
Teams preparing evidence packets where provenance and review boundaries matter.
jobs_covered: Convert scanned PDFs and office files into searchable text.
Extract clauses, tables, attachments, and metadata from mixed records.
Run cited research and matter knowledge retrieval with source boundaries.
Build diligence review tables and route higher-risk agent actions through approval gates.
Redact sensitive data before sharing or indexing.
Search large archives before manual review.
editorial_notes: The collection avoids legal-advice framing; these are intake, evidence, and operations tools.
Document-centric entries are favored over general security scanners unless they support compliance evidence work directly.
Research and RAG picks are framed as source-grounded support for legal operations and human review, not automated legal advice.

documenso-open-source-document-signing.why_here: Adds an auditable signing path for contract and approval packets.

docuseal-document-signing-pdf-forms.why_here: Combines PDF form preparation and signatures for document-heavy approval flows.

ocrmypdf-searchable-pdf-ocr-pipeline.why_here: Turns scanned evidence and records into searchable PDFs before review.

apache-tika-document-extractor.why_here: Provides broad-format document extraction when matter files include Office docs, PDFs, and attachments.

apache-tika-document-parser.why_here: Extracts metadata and embedded objects from heterogeneous files for archive triage.

extract-structured-text-metadata-tables-.why_here: Adds an MCP-accessible extraction layer for PDFs, Office files, images, HTML, and other mixed matter inputs before review or indexing.

pdfplumber-python-pdf-text-table-extract.why_here: Pulls tables, text, and layout clues from contract exhibits and regulatory PDFs.

parse-local-pdfs-into-agent-ready-text-j.why_here: Creates text, spatial JSON, and screenshots so reviewers can inspect what an agent saw.

search-pdfs-office-files-ebooks-and-arch.why_here: Finds relevant records across mixed archives before humans spend time opening files one by one.

paperless-ngx-document-ocr-archive-manag.why_here: Provides a durable archive system for scanned paperwork, tags, correspondents, and retrieval.

langextract-llm-structured-text-extracti.why_here: Extracts named entities, obligations, dates, and clauses into auditable structured outputs.

turn-messy-document-collections-into-str.why_here: Turns large contract, diligence, or evidence sets into repeatable structured rows with failure review across the corpus.

redact-pii-from-text-before-sharing-or-i.why_here: Redacts sensitive identifiers before content enters search, summarization, or external review.

search-large-pdfs-and-read-only-the-rele.why_here: Limits review to relevant pages of long PDFs instead of pushing full documents through an agent.

run-local-deep-research-workflows-with-l.why_here: Runs private cited research across web, academic, and local document sources while preserving source links and a controlled knowledge base.

process-redact-ocr-and-sign-documents-wi.why_here: Bundles OCR, redaction, form filling, conversion, and signing for governed document operations.

convert-dense-pdfs-into-llm-ready-text-a.why_here: Converts dense scanned or layout-heavy PDFs into page-aligned text for cited review.

turn-documents-into-validated-knowledge-.why_here: Extracts schema-checked entities and relationships when matters need structured fact maps.

use-ragflow-as-a-retrieval-and-context-l.why_here: Provides a supervised RAG layer for matter document knowledge bases with traceable source support before agent answers are reviewed.
use-ragflow-as-a-retrieval-and-context-l.persona: Matter knowledge manager / legal AI ops

extract-structured-markdown-json-and-tag.why_here: Produces markdown, coordinate-aware JSON, and accessibility-oriented outputs from PDF packets.

enrich-paperless-ngx-documents-with-ai-g.why_here: Improves archive metadata after ingestion so humans can search and route records faster.

capture-a-live-webpage-as-a-clean-pdf-or.why_here: Preserves web evidence as readable offline artifacts for citation and handoff.

extract-structured-data-and-attachments-.why_here: Normalizes raw email evidence and attachments before archive search or review.

strip-quoted-email-history-and-signature.why_here: Separates the newest human reply from long threads so summaries do not duplicate history.

load-mbox-mail-archives-into-sqlite-for-.why_here: Turns mailbox archives into queryable SQLite evidence stores for offline audit work.

markitdown-document-to-markdown-converte.why_here: Converts Office files, PDFs, email-like documents, and other matter inputs into Markdown for review packets and audit summaries.

mineru-pdf-to-markdown-document-parser.why_here: Handles complex PDFs with layout-aware Markdown and JSON output for contract packets, exhibits, and long-form compliance evidence.

put-approval-gates-and-audit-ready-polic.why_here: Adds approval gates and replayable decision evidence when legal AI workflows need human review before external actions.
put-approval-gates-and-audit-ready-polic.persona: Legal AI governance lead / compliance ops

extract-ocr-ready-markdown-from-document.why_here: Turns scanned contracts, exhibits, and evidence PDFs into reviewable Markdown before legal search or redaction workflows.

build-managed-document-parsing-pipelines.why_here: Provides a managed parsing path for high-volume contract and policy packets where local parsers are too brittle.

prepare-agent-ready-pdf-and-document-ext.why_here: Gives legal ops a fast source-backed PDF extraction step before contract review, diligence packets, or clause analysis.

convert-complex-pdfs-and-document-images.why_here: Turns scanned or layout-heavy legal documents into Markdown that downstream review agents can cite and inspect.

parse-agent-ready-pdfs-and-document-imag.why_here: Adds an OCR path for mixed legal PDFs and document images before matter summaries or compliance checks.

evaluate-document-parsers-for-agent-inge.why_here: Lets teams compare extraction quality before standardizing a parser for legal review workflows.

convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.why_here: Converts mixed PDFs, scans, office files, images, and URLs into Markdown or structured JSON before contract review, diligence packets, policy review, or compliance intake.
convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.persona: Legal ops analyst / compliance document intake lead

collections.title: Healthcare Documentation & Intake
collections.description: Documentation intake, OCR, transcription, structured extraction, and biomedical literature support for paperwork-heavy workflows.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep the framing explicitly non-clinical. This is for documentation, intake, extraction, transcription, and literature support — not diagnosis or medical decision support.
who_for: Healthcare operations, intake, research, and documentation teams handling paperwork-heavy non-clinical workflows.
Teams that need PHI-aware extraction and literature support with explicit human review boundaries.
jobs_covered: Extract text and tables from intake forms and scanned records.
Transcribe documentation audio into reviewable text.
Query literature and FHIR resources for documentation support.
Redact sensitive fields before downstream sharing.
editorial_notes: This collection is explicitly not diagnosis, treatment, or medical decision support.
Prefer documentation, intake, transcription, extraction, and review workflows with audit-friendly outputs.

pubmed-literature-mining-agent.why_here: Adds literature lookup for documentation and research support without making clinical recommendations.

langextract-llm-structured-text-extracti.why_here: Extracts structured fields from intake notes, letters, and forms for human-reviewed documentation.

ocrmypdf-searchable-pdf-ocr-pipeline.why_here: Makes scanned forms and records searchable before routing or summarization.

whisperx-speech-recognition-timestamps-d.why_here: Transcribes documentation audio with speaker and word timing for reviewable notes.

docuseal-document-signing-pdf-forms.why_here: Supports consent, intake, and administrative forms that need signatures and structured PDF fields.

parse-multilingual-documents-for-agent-i.why_here: Adds multilingual layout parsing for intake forms, referrals, and mixed-language documentation queues before human review.
parse-multilingual-documents-for-agent-i.persona: Healthcare intake ops / document automation engineer

expose-fhir-healthcare-data-resources-to.why_here: Lets agents inspect FHIR resources with explicit PHI and clinical-use boundaries.

unstructured-document-etl-for-llm-pipeli.why_here: Chunks and normalizes intake packets into structured elements before PHI-aware retrieval or abstraction workflows.

beautifulsoup-academic-paper-parser.why_here: Parses PubMed and scholarly HTML metadata so literature-support packets keep citations, authors, and source links intact.

parse-local-pdfs-into-agent-ready-text-j.why_here: Keeps local PDF extraction inspectable with text, JSON, and screenshots before PHI-sensitive review.

redact-pii-from-text-before-sharing-or-i.why_here: Removes obvious identifiers before documentation text is shared, indexed, or sent downstream.

surya-document-ocr-layout-analysis-table.why_here: Adds layout-aware OCR and table recognition for scanned forms, records, and intake packets.

paddleocr-multilingual-document-ocr-tool.why_here: Adds multilingual OCR and structured extraction for scanned intake forms, referral packets, and mixed-language documentation queues.
paddleocr-multilingual-document-ocr-tool.persona: Healthcare intake ops / document automation engineer

whisper-cpp-local-transcription-engine.why_here: Provides a local transcription option for documentation audio when teams want reviewable text artifacts without sending recordings through a hosted service.

extract-structured-text-metadata-tables-.why_here: Gives agents one MCP-accessible extraction layer for PDFs, Office files, images, HTML, and other mixed healthcare intake inputs.
extract-structured-text-metadata-tables-.persona: Health data engineer / AI documentation ops

tesseract-ocr-document-extractor.why_here: Adds a proven OCR path for scanned intake forms, referral packets, and legacy paperwork before human review.
tesseract-ocr-document-extractor.persona: Healthcare intake ops / document automation engineer

extract-ocr-ready-markdown-from-document.why_here: Helps intake teams convert scanned referrals, forms, and PDFs into text artifacts before review or routing.

build-managed-document-parsing-pipelines.why_here: Adds a managed document parsing option for structured intake packets, with humans still responsible for regulated-data review.

convert-complex-pdfs-and-document-images.why_here: Prepares scanned forms, referrals, and packet-style documents for reviewable intake summaries without treating OCR as diagnosis.

parse-agent-ready-pdfs-and-document-imag.why_here: Covers document-image parsing for intake packets where text extraction must happen before routing or abstraction.

build-ocr-and-layout-analysis-preprocess.why_here: Adds layout-aware preprocessing for forms, tables, and multi-section medical paperwork before human review.

evaluate-document-parsers-for-agent-inge.why_here: Helps compare parser behavior on healthcare paperwork before adopting one extraction path for regulated workflows.

convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.why_here: Prepares mixed healthcare paperwork, forms, scans, and office documents for non-clinical intake routing, abstraction, and human review.
convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.persona: Healthcare documentation ops / intake automation owner

collections.title: Product Analytics & Growth Ops
collections.description: Product analytics, feature flags, rollout checks, session replay, privacy-friendly web analytics, and experiment/evaluation workflows.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this close to product teams, rollout operations, and growth analytics. Do not turn it into a generic BI shelf.
who_for: Product, growth, analytics, and rollout teams that need agents to inspect metrics, flags, and experiment evidence.
Operators who need lightweight analytics workflows before escalating to full BI or data engineering work.
jobs_covered: Inspect product analytics and session replay data.
Plan and verify feature flag rollouts.
Query local or embedded analytics datasets.
Create repeatable evidence reports for launches and experiments.
editorial_notes: This is a product-ops collection, not a generic BI shelf.
The strongest picks connect analytics to rollout decisions and reviewable evidence.

posthog-product-analytics-and-feature-fl.why_here: Combines event capture and feature flags so launch evidence connects to product behavior.

flagsmith-feature-flag-remote-config.why_here: Provides open-source flag and remote-config control for staged product rollouts.

control-launch-behavior-with-go-feature-.why_here: Adds OpenFeature-compatible rollout controls for staged launches, experiments, and reversible release gates.

design-and-verify-launchdarkly-feature-f.why_here: Makes flag targeting changes reviewable before they affect production cohorts.

configure-and-interpret-launchdarkly-ai-.why_here: Covers AI-config evaluations where product teams need judge-backed online evidence.

openreplay-self-hosted-session-replay-an.why_here: Adds session replay evidence when metrics alone do not explain user behavior.

plausible-analytics-privacy-first-web-an.why_here: Provides lightweight privacy-friendly web analytics for funnel and launch monitoring.

umami-privacy-focused-web-analytics.why_here: Offers self-hostable web analytics for teams that need simple events without surveillance-heavy tooling.

metabase-open-source-business-intelligen.why_here: Turns product and growth data into dashboards that non-engineers can inspect.

duckdb-sql-analytics-agent.why_here: Lets teams analyze local event exports and experiment files before building warehouse models.

evidence-bi-as-code-sql-markdown-analyti.why_here: Builds versioned SQL-backed data reports that can live beside launch docs.

run-repeatable-agent-evaluation-suites-w.why_here: Adds repeatable AI-agent evaluation evidence for launch readiness, complementing analytics and feature-flag workflows.

monitor-and-evaluate-llm-agent-traffic-w.why_here: Routes LLM and agent traffic through observable traces, costs, latency, prompts, and evaluations before product changes ship.

use-prompt-flow-for-llm-workflow-testing.why_here: Builds, tests, traces, and evaluates LLM workflow graphs so teams can promote reviewed versions instead of ad hoc prompt changes.

stripe-revenue-analytics-dashboard.why_here: Adds revenue analytics for growth teams tracking MRR, churn, LTV, and subscription movement from Stripe data.

use-pandasai-for-conversational-csv-and-.why_here: Gives growth and product teams a fast way to interrogate CSV exports before committing to dashboard or warehouse work.

query-postgres-databases-through-read-on.why_here: Adds read-only Postgres analysis for product metrics while keeping write access out of exploratory agent workflows.

trace-evaluate-simulate-and-guardrail-ag.why_here: Connects release evaluation and guardrail checks to growth experiments and AI-feature launch readiness.

collections.title: DevRel & API Documentation Workflows
collections.description: API docs, OpenAPI references, SDK generation, docs-site publishing, prose linting, and developer enablement workflows.
collections.editorial_caution: Frame this as developer enablement and API documentation, not a generic software-industry bucket.
who_for: DevRel, API platform, SDK, and documentation teams maintaining references, examples, and docs sites.
Teams that need agents to validate docs and API contracts before publishing.
jobs_covered: Render and lint OpenAPI references.
Generate typed clients and SDK docs.
Build and publish versioned documentation sites.
Check Markdown links and prose quality before release.
editorial_notes: The collection emphasizes developer enablement over generic engineering utilities.
Tools should reduce stale docs, broken references, or SDK drift.

redoc-openapi-documentation-renderer.why_here: Publishes clean OpenAPI references for API consumers who need fast navigation.

scalar-openapi-reference-api-client-plat.why_here: Combines reference docs and request testing so developers can inspect endpoints in context.

redocly-cli-openapi-linter-documentation.why_here: Bundles linting, validation, bundling, and docs generation in one OpenAPI release gate.

devdocs-unified-api-documentation-browse.why_here: Gives agents and developers a fast offline-searchable API reference surface.

mkdocs-project-documentation-generator.why_here: Provides a stable Markdown-to-docs-site path for project and internal docs.

fumadocs-react-documentation-framework-a.why_here: Fits React/Next.js docs teams that need a modern docs framework rather than a static-only stack.

vale-prose-linter-technical-docs.why_here: Catches style, terminology, and readability drift before generated docs ship.

orval-openapi-client-regeneration-skill-.why_here: Regenerates typed API clients from OpenAPI specs so examples and SDKs stay aligned.

spectral-openapi-asyncapi-linter.why_here: Enforces API style and contract rules before docs or generated clients depend on the spec.

bundle-and-validate-openapi-files-into-o.why_here: Compiles multi-file OpenAPI definitions into one artifact for publishing or review.

resolve-and-validate-openapi-specs-with-.why_here: Resolves remote references so codegen and docs are based on the actual compiled contract.

run-http-and-rest-request-files-with-var.why_here: Turns API examples into executable checks that catch stale docs and broken sample flows.

publish-versioned-mkdocs-documentation-w.why_here: Keeps older docs versions available while publishing new releases.

verify-markdown-links-before-docs-or-con.why_here: Catches broken links across docs and README files before they reach developers.

typedoc-typescript-api-documentation-gen.why_here: Adds TypeScript API documentation generation, a major docs workflow not currently represented in the collection.

update-repository-docs-automatically-aft.why_here: Lets agents open reviewable docs-update PRs after code changes, reducing stale developer documentation.

validate-python-docstrings-against-funct.why_here: Catches stale Python docstrings when APIs change, improving generated and maintained reference docs.

openapi-generator-api-client-server-stub.why_here: Generates client SDKs and server stubs from OpenAPI specs, closing the loop between API documentation and usable developer artifacts.

swagger-ui-documentation-deployer.why_here: Publishes interactive API references from OpenAPI specs so developers can inspect endpoints without custom docs infrastructure.

bootstrap-openapi-spec-from-captured-api.why_here: Turns captured API traffic into a starter OpenAPI spec before client generation, docs cleanup, or test automation.

build-versioned-technical-docs-sites-wit.why_here: Adds a practical docs-site build path for versioned API and developer documentation with navigation and search.

lint-and-auto-format-markdown-documentat.why_here: Keeps generated Markdown docs consistent before agent-authored changes reach a docs repo or release branch.

generate-go-api-docs-from-source-annotat.why_here: Generates Swagger/OpenAPI documentation from Go handler annotations before DevRel teams publish API references or regenerate clients.
generate-go-api-docs-from-source-annotat.persona: API platform engineer / DevRel docs maintainer

collections.title: Customer Support & Success
collections.description: Helpdesk queues, ticket triage, conversation lookup, knowledge-base workflows, customer context, CRM sync, and reply-drafting support.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this about support operations and customer context. Do not imply autonomous customer-service replacement.
who_for: Support, success, and CX operations teams triaging tickets, conversations, knowledge-base gaps, and customer context.
Teams that want safer reply drafting with source context rather than autonomous customer-service replacement.
jobs_covered: Search helpdesk conversations before drafting replies.
Sync CRM and customer context into support workflows.
Maintain knowledge-base material and internal notes.
Summarize calls, emails, and tickets into action records.
editorial_notes: Keep humans responsible for final customer-facing messages.
Favor tools that expose ticket and knowledge context cleanly over generic chatbot wrappers.

zammad-open-source-helpdesk-ticketing-sy.why_here: Provides a self-hosted ticketing system for teams that need full helpdesk workflow control.

chatwoot-open-source-customer-engagement.why_here: Unifies chat, email, and social support channels for teams managing customer conversations.

collections.title: Real Estate Workflows
collections.description: Property research support, transaction paperwork, signature routing, document intake, CRM context, and listing follow-up workflows for real-estate operations.
collections.editorial_caution: Treat this as a cautious operations-and-paperwork pilot. Do not imply MLS completeness, valuation accuracy, legal advice, or buyer/seller recommendations.
who_for: Real-estate operations, transaction coordinators, broker teams, and property researchers handling documents and follow-up.
Teams that need paperwork, CRM, and property-data support without implying valuation or legal advice.
jobs_covered: Prepare and route transaction paperwork.
Extract and search property documents.
Maintain contact exports and follow-up lists without making generic CRM the collection center.
Retrieve property facts for human-reviewed research packets.
editorial_notes: This is an operations-and-paperwork collection, not valuation, legal advice, or MLS completeness.
Review boundaries matter because property data and transaction documents can be stale or jurisdiction-sensitive.
Generic CRM picks were removed from primary picks; GTM & RevOps Workflows now owns broad CRM enrichment and CRM platform coverage.

docuseal-document-signing-pdf-forms.why_here: Supports offer, disclosure, and transaction forms that need filled fields and signatures.

paperless-ngx-document-ocr-archive-manag.why_here: Creates a searchable archive for contracts, disclosures, inspection reports, and closing paperwork.

ocrmypdf-searchable-pdf-ocr-pipeline.why_here: Makes scanned property and transaction documents searchable before packet review.

pdfplumber-python-pdf-text-table-extract.why_here: Extracts tables and structured details from PDFs such as statements, reports, and schedules.

langextract-llm-structured-text-extracti.why_here: Pulls structured facts from property descriptions, disclosures, and transaction notes.

search-pdfs-office-files-ebooks-and-arch.why_here: Finds relevant terms across property packets and archived transaction files quickly.

rag-backed-real-estate-property-research.why_here: Builds evidence-backed property research notes while keeping recommendations human-reviewed.

retrieve-zillow-style-property-details-a.why_here: Adds supervised property-detail and market-trend lookup for research packets.

connect-mcp-agents-to-batchdata-property.why_here: Enriches addresses and property records through a structured API surface instead of manual lookup.

normalize-vcard-contact-exports-into-str.why_here: Cleans contact exports from phones, email, or events before CRM dedupe and import.

weasyprint-html-css-pdf-document-generat.why_here: Generates clean PDFs for property packets, disclosures, summaries, and transaction handoffs.

collections.title: Education & Research Workflows
collections.description: Literature review, citation context, research synthesis, paper drafting, replication checks, and evidence packets for academic and technical teams.
collections.editorial_caution: Frame these as research workflow aids, not peer-review substitutes, authorship guarantees, or automated scientific claims.
who_for: Researchers, academic labs, research analysts, and science or technical writing teams turning scattered sources into reviewable research artifacts.
Knowledge workers doing literature review, citation review, paper drafting, replication checks, and synthesis with explicit human judgment.
jobs_covered: Search personal, academic, and web research sources before drafting.
Extract citation context, paper metadata, and dense PDF text into usable artifacts.
Turn research questions into reviewable outlines, drafts, and replication plans.
Package findings into diagrams, archived sources, and human-reviewed research briefs.
editorial_notes: Prefer source-linked research artifacts over unsupported summary-only workflows.
Keep citation, authorship, and scientific claims under human review, especially for publishable work.
Include both academic search and document-conversion picks so the collection supports real research operations, not just paper discovery.

search-and-analyze-zotero-research-libra.why_here: Connects research agents to a Zotero library so teams can search papers, inspect annotations, and ground literature review in their own source corpus.

ground-research-agents-in-zotero-librari.why_here: Adds deeper Zotero-native research operations: paper chat, citation-grounded answers, note saving, tagging, importing, and library-wide review.

search-and-analyze-arxiv-papers-through-.why_here: Adds arXiv search, download, and local paper storage for technical literature review and fast-moving research areas.

beautifulsoup-academic-paper-parser.why_here: Extracts paper metadata, affiliations, DOI details, and references from academic HTML sources before citation review.

serpapi-scholar-agent.why_here: Covers Google Scholar-style citation lookup, BibTeX export, and author/citation context for literature maps.

run-nature-style-academic-writing-and-fi.why_here: Gives science teams reusable manuscript, figure, citation, and response-drafting workflows shaped around academic writing norms.

turn-a-research-idea-into-a-draft-paper-.why_here: Turns a raw research topic into literature review, experiment planning, draft writing, and verification artifacts.

run-research-and-scientific-analysis-wor.why_here: Adds domain-specific scientific workflow guidance when general prompting is too loose for research-heavy analysis.

run-academic-research-workflows-with-cla.why_here: Guides literature review, experiment tracking, evidence records, result reporting, and paper-writing through a structured research-agent workflow.
run-academic-research-workflows-with-cla.persona: Academic lab lead / research project owner

run-academic-writing-analysis-and-replic.why_here: Adds quality-gated paper, analysis, slide, and replication workflows with review checkpoints before results are shared.

run-local-deep-research-workflows-with-l.why_here: Runs private research passes across web, academic, and local document sources with citations and an encrypted knowledge base.

convert-dense-pdfs-into-llm-ready-text-a.why_here: Converts scanned or layout-heavy papers into page-aligned Markdown for citation-aware review and synthesis.

capture-a-live-webpage-as-a-clean-pdf-or.why_here: Captures web sources as clean offline artifacts so research packets can preserve cited pages and review context.

excalidraw-virtual-whiteboard-diagram-sd.why_here: Supports research diagrams, study designs, paper figures, and collaborative whiteboarding before findings are written up.

search-notebooklm-notebooks-sources-and-.why_here: Lets research agents search NotebookLM notebooks, source sets, notes, and study artifacts without leaving the research workspace.

parameterize-and-execute-notebooks-as-re.why_here: Turns notebooks into parameterized repeatable runs for analysis, replication checks, and teaching workflows.

automate-ml-research-loops-with-aris-ski.why_here: Supports iterative ML experiment planning, execution, and review loops with reusable research-agent structure.

use-docsgpt-for-document-grounded-enterp.why_here: Lets research and education teams build grounded assistants over course material, papers, or institutional knowledge bases.

build-graph-rag-context-with-neo4j-llm-g.why_here: Converts bounded research or institutional document sets into inspectable knowledge graphs before graph-backed retrieval is used.

run-rag-chatbot-workflows-with-verba.why_here: Builds a reviewable RAG chatbot over a bounded source set so grounded answers can be checked before reuse in research workflows.

run-autonomous-deep-research-workflows-w.why_here: Adds an autonomous research workflow for literature scans, source gathering, and first-pass synthesis packets.

run-scheduled-research-automations-with-.why_here: Schedules recurring source-backed research digests and alerts so teams can monitor the same knowledge sources with reviewable outputs.

chat-with-private-document-collections-t.why_here: Lets research teams index private document collections and ask cited, grounded questions over bounded source sets.

draft-cited-research-reports-with-storm.why_here: Supports literature-style research workflows where an agent drafts cited reports from multiple perspectives for review.

evaluate-agent-and-model-workflows-with-.why_here: Adds an evaluation layer for research teams comparing model or agent workflows before using outputs in studies.

collections.title: GTM & RevOps Workflows
collections.description: Demand generation, SEO and content operations, lifecycle email, CRM enrichment, lead routing, social listening, trend monitoring, feedback capture, and sales/revenue operations workflows.
who_for: Demand generation, growth, and marketing operations teams building repeatable acquisition workflows.
RevOps and CRM teams responsible for enrichment, routing, cleanup, scheduling, and sales handoff.
Lifecycle marketers and content operators who need auditable campaign and SEO workflows, not one-off prompts.
jobs_covered: Plan SEO, content-gap, keyword, and technical audit workflows.
Design lifecycle email, newsletter, and owned-audience campaign operations.
Enrich CRM contacts, route leads, schedule handoffs, and keep revenue data usable.
Capture customer feedback and route GTM signals into follow-up workflows.
Monitor public discussion, social channels, and market trends before campaign or positioning decisions.

mautic-marketing-automation-platform.why_here: Provides a self-hosted marketing automation base for demand generation, segmentation, lead scoring, and lifecycle campaign operations.
mautic-marketing-automation-platform.persona: Marketing ops lead / demand generation manager

plan-programmatic-seo-pages-at-scale.why_here: Plans scalable SEO page programs with guardrails against thin, duplicated, or low-intent content expansion.

run-evidence-backed-agentic-seo-audits-w.why_here: Collects crawl, schema, performance, sitemap, robots, and content evidence before turning SEO findings into a prioritized action plan.

run-repeatable-google-ads-and-seo-audits.why_here: Turns paid search and SEO account reviews into a repeatable audit workflow with evidence and recommendations.

ghost-open-source-publishing-platform-me.why_here: Gives content teams a publishing, membership, and newsletter surface for owned media programs.

openseo-self-hosted-keyword-research-seo.why_here: Adds self-hosted keyword research and SEO analysis for teams that want search planning evidence without vendor lock-in.

seonaut-open-source-technical-seo-audit.why_here: Crawls sites for technical SEO issues before prioritizing fixes for demand-generation pages.

unlighthouse-site-wide-lighthouse-seo-au.why_here: Runs site-wide Lighthouse checks so SEO and web performance issues are visible across templates, not just one URL.
unlighthouse-site-wide-lighthouse-seo-au.persona: Web growth engineer / technical SEO lead

ahrefs-content-gap-finder-agent.why_here: Identifies content opportunities against competitors and existing ranking gaps for demand-generation planning.

ahrefs-keyword-gap-analysis-skill.why_here: Compares keyword coverage against competitors so content teams can prioritize missing commercial and informational terms.

semrush-keyword-research-agent-api-v3.why_here: Uses SEMrush keyword data for research, prioritization, and campaign planning through a repeatable agent workflow.

semrush-content-optimizer-agent.why_here: Listed-only SEMrush content optimization option for teams that already use SEMrush and need human-reviewed content guidance.

keyword-cluster-generator-agent.why_here: Groups related keywords into clusters so content plans map to topics and page types instead of isolated terms.

keyword-cannibalization-detector.why_here: Finds overlapping ranking targets before teams create duplicate pages or split search intent across multiple assets.

salesforce-mcp-server.why_here: Connects agent workflows to Salesforce records and operations through an MCP-compatible surface for supervised CRM work.

salesforce-bulk-api-data-loader.why_here: Handles bulk Salesforce data movement for imports, cleanup, enrichment, and operational backfills.

hubspot-mcp-server.why_here: Connects agent workflows to HubSpot CRM objects, contacts, companies, and engagement data for supervised RevOps tasks.

hubspot-crm-contact-enrichment-pipeline.why_here: Enriches and updates HubSpot contacts before sales handoff, lifecycle segmentation, or campaign routing.

twenty-open-source-crm-salesforce-altern.why_here: Provides an open CRM base for teams that need customizable pipeline, account, and contact workflows outside Salesforce.

zapier-lead-enrichment-workflow.why_here: Builds a concrete lead-enrichment workflow across forms, enrichment services, CRM updates, and team notifications.

cal-com-open-source-scheduling-infrastru.why_here: Adds scheduling infrastructure for demos, sales calls, onboarding, customer interviews, and routing follow-up.
cal-com-open-source-scheduling-infrastru.persona: Sales ops lead / customer lifecycle operator

n8n-workflow-webhook-bridge.why_here: Connects forms, webhooks, CRMs, enrichment steps, and notifications into repeatable GTM automation flows.
n8n-workflow-webhook-bridge.persona: RevOps automation engineer / growth ops builder

formbricks-open-source-survey-experience.why_here: Collects website, in-app, link, and email feedback that can inform lifecycle campaigns, qualification, and customer expansion workflows.

run-multi-agent-public-opinion-analysis-.why_here: Turns public discussion into evidence-backed opinion reports for market, campaign, and positioning research.
run-multi-agent-public-opinion-analysis-.persona: GTM research analyst / market intelligence lead

monitor-cross-platform-trends-and-alert-.why_here: Monitors cross-platform trends, summarizes signals, and alerts operators before GTM opportunities or risks are missed.

xquik-x-data-api-skill.why_here: Adds X search, profile inspection, bulk extraction, and account or keyword monitoring for social listening workflows.

build-react-agent-chat-interfaces-with-a.why_here: Fits GTM teams building customer-facing or internal agent interfaces around sales, support, and revenue workflows.

editorial_notes: This collection is practitioner-focused: use it for operational GTM workflows, not broad marketing strategy or unsupervised outbound.
Vendor-family caps are intentional: Salesforce, HubSpot, Ahrefs, and SEMrush are limited to two primary picks each.
SEMrush Content Optimizer is included as a listed-only option for teams already using SEMrush; review source, terms, and data handling before production use.
Formbricks Survey and Experience Management was chosen over the narrower Formbricks survey-platform duplicate because the GTM workflow depends on lifecycle feedback and customer experience signals.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep CRM writes, enrichment, email sending, and paid-search changes human-reviewed; avoid using these skills for spam, scraped outreach, or unauthorized contact processing.

collections.title: AI Agency Operations & FDE Workflows
collections.description: Client-facing AI delivery, forward deployed engineering workflows, browser automation, implementation systems, documentation, spreadsheets, proposals, and client handoff workflows.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this collection focused on implementation and client delivery. Use GTM & RevOps Workflows for marketing automation, SEO operations, CRM enrichment, and lead handoff tooling.
who_for: AI agency founders, forward deployed engineers, automation consultants, client delivery leads, and solutions engineers packaging repeatable AI-enabled services for clients.
Teams delivering supervised client implementations that need browser automation, agent app scaffolding, design-to-code context, implementation artifacts, and release checks.
jobs_covered: Audit client sites, docs, workflows, and product surfaces for implementation planning.
Build repeatable client automation workflows across browsers, agent apps, tools, and internal systems.
Package findings into proposals, reports, docs, spreadsheets, and handoff artifacts.
Implement browser automation, design-to-code, workflow delivery, and client-facing agent stacks.
Monitor delivery quality and reusable agency workflows.
editorial_notes: Avoid drifting into generic agent engineering, security operations, CI/CD, or broad developer tooling.
Prioritize tools that produce reviewable client artifacts or connect agency workflows to real business systems.
Marketing automation, SEO/content ops, CRM enrichment, and RevOps handoff tooling now live in GTM & RevOps Workflows so this collection stays focused on FDE and client delivery.

firecrawl-markdown-capture-pipeline.why_here: Captures clean Markdown from client sites for audits, content inventories, knowledge-base builds, and handoff docs.

use-flowise-for-visual-agent-workflow-or.why_here: Lets agencies compose, test, and hand off inspectable agent flows instead of leaving client automations as prompt-only prototypes.

collections.title: Infrastructure, SRE & Incident Operations
collections.description: Production reliability workflows for Kubernetes, incidents, observability, backups, deploy safety, infrastructure drift, alerts, and runbook-driven debugging.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this persona-based for SRE and platform operations; do not turn it into a generic Monitoring or CI/CD category mirror.
who_for: SREs, platform engineers, DevOps leads, and infrastructure operators responsible for production reliability.
Teams that need Kubernetes, observability, backup, deployment, and incident response workflows joined into one operating shelf.
jobs_covered: Investigate production incidents across Kubernetes, logs, cloud signals, and observability backends.
Review and test infrastructure changes before deploys, Helm releases, Terraform diffs, or cluster manifests cause outages.
Run backup, restore, retention, and alert routing workflows with operator-visible evidence.
Keep cluster operations, dashboards, and runbooks close enough for on-call use.
editorial_notes: This collection crosses Runbooks, Monitoring, CI/CD, Code Quality, Developer Tools, and Integrations because incident work rarely stays inside one category.
Listed Kubernetes agent picks are included only where they represent a distinct operator workflow not covered by stronger security-reviewed alternatives.
Avoid autonomous remediation by default; the collection is built around reviewable signals, controlled runbooks, and operator handoff.

deploy-kubernetes-native-agents-with-kag.why_here: Adds a Kubernetes-native agent control plane for cluster automation experiments that still need operator boundaries.

control-kubernetes-infrastructure-throug.why_here: Lets operators inspect and act on Kubernetes resources through MCP instead of brittle one-off kubectl prompts.

run-kubernetes-cluster-operations-throug.why_here: Covers cluster-level MCP operations for routine checks, triage, and controlled remediation.

operate-kubernetes-and-openshift-cluster.why_here: Extends the cluster-ops workflow to Kubernetes and OpenShift environments where enterprise platform teams need consistent runbooks.

investigate-production-incidents-across-.why_here: Pulls Kubernetes and cloud signals into an incident investigation loop instead of leaving responders to correlate dashboards manually.

tail-multi-pod-kubernetes-logs-by-label-.why_here: Gives responders a fast multi-pod log tailing step during label-scoped outages.

kubernetes-pod-crash-diagnostics-3.why_here: Turns CrashLoopBackOff and pod failure evidence into a focused diagnosis packet for responders.

k9s-kubernetes-terminal-dashboard.why_here: Provides a fast terminal cockpit for cluster inspection during normal operations and incidents.

polaris-kubernetes-best-practices-valida.why_here: Checks Kubernetes workload readiness and policy hygiene before manifest mistakes reach production.

lint-ansible-playbooks-and-roles-before-.why_here: Prevents configuration automation failures by linting playbooks before they run against infrastructure.

argocd-gitops-sync-automator.why_here: Automates GitOps sync checks and actions for teams running ArgoCD-backed production deploys.

helm-chart-diff-upgrade-manager.why_here: Makes Helm upgrades reviewable by surfacing chart diffs before cluster changes land.

plan-and-apply-many-helm-releases-from-o.why_here: Coordinates many Helm releases from a single desired state so platform drift is visible before apply.

run-declarative-kubernetes-test-suites-a.why_here: Runs declarative Kubernetes tests before operator or manifest changes become incident fuel.

terraform-plan-diff-analyzer.why_here: Turns Terraform plan output into an infrastructure-review artifact before risky changes merge.

terraform-drift-detector-2.why_here: Detects drift between declared Terraform state and real infrastructure before incidents or surprise costs appear.

orchestrate-database-backup-restore-rete.why_here: Covers backup, restore, retention, and failure notification as an auditable runbook rather than an ad hoc database chore.

schedule-and-retain-cross-database-backu.why_here: Centralizes scheduled backups and retention across databases for smaller platform teams.

restic-encrypted-backup-tool.why_here: Adds encrypted file and repository backup workflows for production recovery planning.

netdata-real-time-infrastructure-monitor.why_here: Gives infrastructure teams immediate host and service telemetry for alerting and triage.

signoz-open-source-observability-platfor.why_here: Provides logs, metrics, and traces for production reliability investigations without a proprietary-only observability stack.

openobserve-observability-platform-logs-.why_here: Adds a cloud-native observability backend for logs, metrics, traces, and incident search.

convert-smtp-only-alerts-into-routed-not.why_here: Routes legacy SMTP-only alerts into modern notification channels so incidents reach the right responders.

datadog-integration-connector-agent.why_here: Connects Datadog signals into agent workflows for incident context, monitor review, and dashboard triage.

trace-and-debug-agent-runs-with-agentops.why_here: Adds run-level tracing for agent systems that SRE teams need to debug after failures or noisy automation.

trace-llm-and-agent-workflows-with-openl.why_here: Connects LLM and agent traces to OpenTelemetry-style incident investigation workflows.

evaluate-and-monitor-llm-workflows-with-.why_here: Adds monitoring and evaluation coverage for production LLM workflows that need regression signals during incidents.

record-system-level-agent-activity-with-.why_here: Records system-level behavior from agent commands during incidents or postmortems, giving SRE teams evidence beyond agent transcripts.

trace-and-evaluate-llm-application-behav.why_here: Adds OpenTelemetry-style traces, metrics, and evaluations for production LLM and agent applications that SRE teams need to debug and monitor.

profile-python-agent-workloads-with-scal.why_here: Profiles CPU, GPU, and memory hotspots in Python agent services, tool servers, or retrieval pipelines before reliability tuning.
profile-python-agent-workloads-with-scal.persona: AI platform SRE / Python performance engineer

collections.title: Security Operations & GRC Workflows
collections.description: Security operations and governance workflows for dependency risk, secrets, CI hardening, agent guardrails, approvals, policy evidence, threat hunting, red-team checks, and audit-ready releases.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this workflow/persona based for SecOps, AppSec, SOC, and AI governance; do not make it a renamed Security & Verification category page.
who_for: Security engineers, SOC teams, compliance operators, DevSecOps leads, and AI governance owners.
Teams that need approval gates, policy evidence, supply-chain checks, agent guardrails, and threat-hunting workflows in one operating map.
jobs_covered: Scan dependency, container, CI, and repository surfaces for release-blocking risk.
Find secrets, unsafe agent configurations, prompt-injection paths, and MCP attack surfaces before adoption.
Route risky agent or external actions through approval gates with audit evidence.
Generate SBOM, signature, vulnerability, event-log, and policy artifacts for compliance review.
editorial_notes: This collection intentionally blends Security, CI/CD, Templates, and Runbooks because security operations span release gates, agent policy, and incident evidence.
Only one listed SOC seed is included because Hayabusa fills a distinct Windows event-log hunting job; stronger security-reviewed picks dominate the rest.
Do not frame these as autonomous security fixes; the value is evidence, gates, review, and controlled remediation.

scan-project-dependencies-for-supply-cha.why_here: Scans dependency trees for supply-chain risk before approval or release.

run-claude-code-security-operations-with.why_here: Packages Claude Code security workflows for repeatable security operations instead of ad hoc review prompts.

govern-agent-skills-mcp-servers-prompts-.why_here: Audits agent skills, MCP servers, prompts, and tool calls as governed assets with review boundaries.

add-runtime-guardrails-to-typescript-age.why_here: Adds runtime guardrails around TypeScript agent behavior before unsafe tool calls propagate.

pin-ci-workflow-actions-and-images-with-.why_here: Pins workflow actions and images so CI supply-chain inputs stay reviewable and repeatable.

route-risky-coding-agent-work-through-hu.why_here: Routes high-risk coding-agent actions through human approval checkpoints before external effects happen.

red-team-agent-workflows-for-jailbreaks-.why_here: Runs adversarial checks against agent workflows for jailbreaks, prompt injection, and policy failures.

scan-agent-repos-for-repo-poisoning-unsa.why_here: Finds repo poisoning and unsafe AI configuration surfaces before agents trust the workspace.

preflight-agent-specs-for-prompt-injecti.why_here: Checks agent specs for prompt-injection risk across prompts, tools, and architecture before rollout.

turn-windows-event-logs-into-sigma-backe.why_here: Turns Windows event logs into Sigma-backed timelines for SOC triage and investigations.

filter-prompts-and-model-outputs-for-inj.why_here: Screens prompts and model outputs for injection, secrets, toxicity, and policy risks in agent pipelines.

baseline-and-review-repository-secret-fi.why_here: Creates a reviewable baseline for repository secret findings instead of burying alerts in noisy scans.

trufflehog-credential-leak-scanner.why_here: Scans history and code for leaked credentials that need immediate triage.

audit-github-actions-for-privilege-and-s.why_here: Audits GitHub Actions workflows for privilege and supply-chain risk before CI becomes an attack path.

audit-github-actions-workflows-for-insec.why_here: Reviews workflow permissions and unpinned actions as a pre-merge CI hardening step.

catch-agent-era-ci-cd-and-permission-mis.why_here: Targets agent-era CI/CD and permission misconfigurations that normal lint checks miss.

harden-runner-cicd-security-agent-github.why_here: Adds runtime hardening and egress awareness to GitHub Actions jobs.

docker-image-vulnerability-triage.why_here: Prioritizes container image vulnerabilities for remediation rather than dumping raw scanner output.

trivy-security-scanner-containers-iac.why_here: Scans containers and IaC for vulnerabilities and misconfiguration before deploy.

syft-sbom-generator-containers-filesyste.why_here: Generates SBOM evidence for containers and filesystems used in release or audit workflows.

grype-container-sbom-vulnerability-scann.why_here: Maps SBOM and container contents to vulnerabilities for release risk review.

sigstore-cosign-container-signature-chec.why_here: Verifies container signatures so release gates can prove artifact origin.

put-approval-gates-and-audit-ready-polic.why_here: Adds approval gates and policy evidence before agents take external actions.

verify-agent-policy-coverage-and-risky-a.why_here: Checks policy coverage and risky-action guardrails before production agent rollout.

stress-test-agent-defenses-with-agentdoj.why_here: Benchmarks prompt-injection attacks and defenses before agents are trusted with real tools or data.

run-agent-generated-code-in-local-microv.why_here: Runs untrusted agent-generated code and tool calls in local microVM-backed sandboxes for safer review.

evaluate-model-generated-code-execution-.why_here: Tests model-generated code execution behavior inside a controlled benchmark before teams trust automation outputs.

gate-agent-inputs-and-outputs-with-super.why_here: Adds a safety gate for agent inputs and outputs before risky actions reach users or downstream systems.
gate-agent-inputs-and-outputs-with-super.persona: GRC automation owner / AI safety reviewer

emit-policy-receipts-for-hard-rule-agent.why_here: Creates reviewable policy receipts for hard-rule workflows where compliance needs evidence, not just logs.

record-system-level-agent-activity-with-.why_here: Captures process, file, network, prompt, and report activity from agent runs so SecOps and GRC teams can audit what an agent actually did.
record-system-level-agent-activity-with-.persona: AI security engineer / GRC audit operator

scan-agent-dependencies-and-container-in.why_here: Scans dependencies, containers, SBOMs, licenses, and risk signals before agent-generated or agent-adopted code moves toward production.

collections.title: Data Platform & Analytics Engineering
collections.description: Data engineering and analytics operations workflows for SQL, dbt, Airflow, warehouses, Postgres, CSV cleanup, schema quality, retrieval indexes, data catalogs, dashboards, and query tuning.
collections.editorial_caution: Keep this centered on data platform and analytics engineering workflows; do not turn it into a generic Data Extraction category page.
who_for: Data engineers, analytics engineers, data platform teams, BI operators, and database reliability owners.
Teams managing dbt projects, SQL quality, warehouse performance, CSV cleanup, pipeline orchestration, schema review, dashboards, and database operations.
jobs_covered: Operate Airflow and dbt context for pipeline orchestration, lineage, and transformation review.
Lint, format, and validate SQL, dbt, CSV, and schema changes before they break downstream consumers.
Profile local files and query structured exports before loading them into warehouses or dashboards.
Tune PostgreSQL and Snowflake performance while preserving backup and restore readiness.
Build and evaluate retrieval, vector, and catalog context before agents consume data assets.

workflow_stacks.name: Analytics engineering change review
steps: Plan dbt or SQL model change

workflow_stacks.name: Warehouse and database performance
steps: Tune query, index, or RLS behavior

workflow_stacks.name: Tabular intake and cleanup
steps: Inspect large CSV or messy tables

editorial_notes: This collection spans Data Extraction, Code Quality, Runbooks, and dashboarding because data platform work is both engineering and operations.
Several dbt picks are included, but each covers a different job: orchestration, parity, lineage, pre-commit gates, and formatting.
Listed SchemaCrawler is included because live schema inventory is a distinct database-operations gap not covered by the security-reviewed data picks.
Recent RAG and vector-database picks are included when they serve data-platform ownership: retrieval quality, catalog grounding, and production data access.

query-and-inspect-postgres-databases-thr.why_here: Gives agents a controlled Postgres inspection path for schema, table, and query context without turning database access into ad hoc shell work.

query-cross-connector-business-data-for-.why_here: Lets data teams query business context across connectors when analytics questions span tools rather than one warehouse table.

review-sql-server-execution-plans-throug.why_here: Adds SQL Server execution-plan review to the workflow for query tuning and database performance investigations.

run-deterministic-sql-and-dbt-analysis-u.why_here: Keeps SQL and dbt analysis deterministic under coding agents, which matters when agents review warehouse changes.

operate-airflow-and-warehouse-workflows-.why_here: Connects Airflow and warehouse operations through agent-safe data engineering workflows instead of unbounded DAG manipulation.

tune-supabase-postgres-queries-indexing-.why_here: Covers Supabase/Postgres query, index, and RLS tuning where app data teams need database advice tied to production constraints.

compare-dbt-models-and-warehouse-relatio.why_here: Checks dbt model and warehouse parity before migrations or refactors are trusted.

translate-and-validate-sql-across-dialec.why_here: Translates and validates SQL across dialects so warehouse migrations and multi-engine analytics work stay reviewable.

lint-postgresql-migrations-and-sql-chang.why_here: Catches risky PostgreSQL migration patterns before irreversible schema mistakes land.

inspect-large-csv-files-interactively-be.why_here: Provides interactive inspection of large CSV files before teams map, clean, or ingest messy tabular data.

profile-and-triage-messy-tabular-files-f.why_here: Helps analysts profile and triage messy tabular files quickly before building downstream transforms.

plan-and-preview-warehouse-sql-model-cha.why_here: Adds plan-and-preview discipline for warehouse SQL model changes before rollout.

apache-airflow-mcp.why_here: Connects agents to Airflow DAG context and orchestration workflows for platform-owned pipelines.

dbt-cloud-mcp.why_here: Lets agents inspect and operate dbt Cloud context without treating the warehouse as a black box.

dbt-data-transform-orchestrator.why_here: Frames dbt model runs and transformation orchestration as a repeatable analytics engineering workflow.

dbt-model-lineage-extractor-2.why_here: Extracts model lineage so teams can reason about downstream impact before changing data assets.

gate-dbt-projects-with-pre-commit-checks.why_here: Adds pre-commit gates for dbt projects before style, tests, or docs drift.

sqlfluff-sql-linter-auto-formatter.why_here: Lints and formats SQL so warehouse changes are reviewable and consistent.

sqruff-sql-linter-formatter.why_here: Provides a fast SQL lint/format path for teams that need lightweight query quality checks.

duckdb-sql-analytics-agent.why_here: Runs local analytics over structured files for fast investigation without provisioning a warehouse.

trdsql-sql-query-engine-csv-json-yaml-fi.why_here: Queries CSV, JSON, and YAML exports with SQL before loading them into a larger system.

anyquery-universal-sql-engine-mcp-integr.why_here: Turns many APIs and files into SQL-queryable surfaces for agents and data operators.

great-expectations-data-validation-pipel.why_here: Creates explicit data quality expectations and validation artifacts for pipelines.

inventory-live-database-schemas-and-gene.why_here: Inventories live schemas and produces reviewable docs before risky SQL or database changes.

build-local-vector-retrieval-indexes-wit.why_here: Adds a local vector-indexing layer for retrieval and RAG experiments before teams adopt heavier managed vector infrastructure.

expose-data-catalog-context-to-ai-workfl.why_here: Grounds agent-assisted data discovery in catalog metadata, ownership, schema, and lineage context.
expose-data-catalog-context-to-ai-workfl.persona: Data governance lead / analytics platform engineer

query-clickhouse-analytics-safely-from-m.why_here: Gives agents bounded, schema-aware ClickHouse analytics access without handing them ad hoc database credentials.

serve-production-agentic-rag-through-r2r.why_here: Provides production hybrid retrieval and agentic RAG APIs with citations and reviewable document operations.

build-document-search-layers-for-ai-apps.why_here: Adds document ingestion and search quality tuning before AI apps or agents consume retrieval context.
build-document-search-layers-for-ai-apps.persona: Retrieval engineer / AI data platform builder

parse-multi-format-rag-inputs-with-omnip.why_here: Converts PDFs, tables, images, audio, video, and web pages into structured text/markdown so RAG pipelines receive reviewable multi-format inputs.
parse-multi-format-rag-inputs-with-omnip.persona: Retrieval engineer / data ingestion platform owner

add-postgres-native-vector-retrieval-to-.why_here: Stores embeddings beside application data in Postgres for semantic search, RAG, recommendations, and agent memory retrieval.
add-postgres-native-vector-retrieval-to-.persona: Postgres data platform engineer / retrieval engineer

generate-and-evaluate-retrieval-embeddin.why_here: Helps teams choose, evaluate, and rerank retrieval embeddings before feeding context into RAG workflows.

scale-agent-retrieval-workloads-with-mil.why_here: Adds a scalable vector database path for filtered similarity search across RAG and agent retrieval workloads.
scale-agent-retrieval-workloads-with-mil.persona: Vector database operator / data platform engineer

build-enterprise-rag-and-agent-workflows.why_here: Assembles and evaluates enterprise RAG workflows across internal data, models, and business users.
build-enterprise-rag-and-agent-workflows.persona: Enterprise AI platform lead / retrieval workflow owner

build-portable-single-file-agent-memory-.why_here: Gives analytics teams a portable context layer for packaging large reference sets without standing up a full service.

build-graph-based-retrieval-workflows-wi.why_here: Adds a graph retrieval option for analytics teams working with relationship-heavy corpora and entity context.

query-neo4j-graph-data-from-agent-workfl.why_here: Lets agents inspect governed Neo4j graph data through MCP instead of copying graph context into prompts.
query-neo4j-graph-data-from-agent-workfl.persona: Graph data engineer / analytics platform owner

convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.why_here: Adds a mixed-document normalization step for analytics and RAG ingestion pipelines that need Markdown, JSON, CSV, or HTML before downstream processing.
convert-mixed-documents-into-agent-ready.persona: Data platform engineer / document ingestion owner
